name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_coefficient_seed
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisCoefficientSeed normalizes compact multi-axis L2 run summaries into signed force moment and pressure-center coefficient seeds.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_run_matrix
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisRunMatrix supplies compact force moment pressure-center run summaries for every sweep target.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: l2_static_airframe_multi_axis_sweep_plan
value: Aerodynamics4McL2StaticAirframeMultiAxisSweepPlan supplies projected reference areas reference lengths and fit roles for each sweep direction.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: drone_physics_airframe
value: DronePhysics contains the body-axis drag lift sideforce moment and pressure-center paths these live coefficients may later inform behind gates.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis static-airframe coefficient fitting.

name: aerodynamics4mc_l2_target
value: Aerodynamics4MC Core is the upstream target for live multi-axis L2 coefficient extraction.
note: Reference surface for future live multi-axis static-airframe coefficient fitting.
